description: Send notifications to your own BulkSMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise bulksms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a BulkSMS v1/messages JSON body and post it to api.bulksms.com (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-bulksms_sms

request.template: {"urls":"bulksms://${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_USER }:${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_PASSWORD }@${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"bulksms://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"to":"${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_TO }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *},"routingGroup":"STANDARD","encoding":"TEXT"}

{"to":"${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_TO }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *},"routingGroup":"STANDARD","encoding":"TEXT"}
